evals.name: intro-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the intro section (AE, SE, Deal Type, Next Call, Next Call Agenda) renders with each field on its own line, not collapsed into a single paragraph.
evals.expected_output:
HTML output has
tags between each bold-label field in the intro paragraph. AE, SE, Deal Type, Next Call, and Next Call Agenda each appear on separate visual lines.

assertions.name: intro-fields-have-linebreaks
assertions.description:
The intro section (AE/SE/Deal Type/Next Call) must have
tags between consecutive bold-label lines. At least N-1 breaks for N fields.

assertions.name: empty-csm-removed
assertions.description: The CSM field is empty in the fixture and should be removed entirely, not rendered as a blank label.
assertions.check:
HTML must NOT contain 'CSM:' followed by only whitespace before the next
or

evals.name: meddpicc-summary-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the MEDDPICC summary callout renders each field (Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, etc.) on its own line.
evals.expected_output:
The blockquote after the MEDDPICC heading has
tags between each bullet field. Each '- **Field:** value' item appears on a separate line.

assertions.name: meddpicc-callout-has-linebreaks
assertions.description:
MEDDPICC summary blockquote must have
tags between the 8 MEDDPICC fields (Metrics through Competition). At least 7 line breaks expected.

assertions.name: no-collapsed-bullets
assertions.description: No bullet items should be collapsed together (pattern: 'value - <strong>' without a preceding line break indicates collapsed items).

evals.name: techmaps-summary-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the TECHMAPS summary callout renders each field on its own line.
evals.expected_output:
The blockquote after the TECHMAPS heading has
tags between fields. Technical Requirements, Environment, Competitors, Hero, Metrics, Alignment, Plan, and Support each appear on separate lines.

assertions.name: techmaps-callout-has-linebreaks
assertions.description:
TECHMAPS summary blockquote must have
tags between fields.

evals.name: com-summary-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the Command of the Message summary callout renders Before/Pain/Required/After on separate lines.
evals.expected_output:
The blockquote after the Command of the Message heading has
tags between the Before, Pain, Required, and After fields.

assertions.name: com-callout-has-linebreaks
assertions.description:
CoM summary blockquote must have
tags between the 4 fields.

evals.name: today-mode-daily-note-scan
evals.expected_output: Reads today's daily note, finds accounts with checked /ld-summarize-account tasks, exports only those accounts
expectations: Today's daily note read at {vault_path}/Daily/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md
Lines with '[x] Run /ld-summarize-account' parsed to extract account names
Only accounts with checked summarize task are exported
If no accounts were summarized today, reports 'No accounts were summarized today' and stops
Each matched account verified to have substantive content before export

evals.name: all-mode-content-filter
evals.expected_output: Exports all accounts with real content, skips template-only accounts
expectations: All account folders listed in {company_folder}/Accounts/
Each account's main file checked for substantive content beyond template
Accounts with MEDDPICC content filled in are included
Accounts with Ledger.md entries are included
Accounts with only empty template sections are skipped
Skipped accounts listed in report under 'Skipped (no content)'

evals.name: transclusion-and-wikilink-resolution
evals.prompt: Preprocess an account file and verify all Obsidian-specific syntax is resolved or removed
evals.expected_output: All transclusions resolved, wiki-links converted, dataview blocks removed, inline expressions substituted
expectations: ![[Ledger]] replaced with actual Ledger.md content inlined
![[contacts.base]] replaced with generated contacts table from contact files
![[meetings.base]] replaced with generated meetings table from meeting files
Dataview code blocks fully removed
Inline dataview expressions like '= this.ae' replaced with frontmatter values
Wiki-links [[path/to/file|Display Text]] converted to just 'Display Text'
Simple wiki-links [[name]] converted to just 'name'
Obsidian callouts '> [!type] Title' converted to '> **Title**'
YAML frontmatter stripped from output
H1 title prepended and generation date added

evals.name: empty-field-removal-before-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess an account file where CSM field is empty and verify it is removed before trailing spaces are added
evals.expected_output: Empty bold-label lines removed in step 7 BEFORE step 8 adds trailing spaces, preventing blank lines with forced breaks
expectations: Lines like '**CSM:** ' with no value after the colon are removed entirely
Removal happens BEFORE trailing spaces are added to consecutive bold-label lines
Remaining consecutive bold-label lines (AE, SE, Deal Type, etc.) get trailing two-space breaks
No orphan line breaks where empty fields used to be
Links line also gets trailing spaces for proper rendering
